title: $fatal should result in a non-zero exit code
body:
```verilog
module tb;
  initial begin
    $fatal;
  end
endmodule
```
I would expect the executable generated with iverilog to have a non-zero exit code to indicate error, but it does not.

I'm using Icarus Verilog version 11.0 (devel) (s20150603-643-gb43fcccc)
